title: Nolando Zombies
description: More zombies for your too-easy zombie mod pack.
body:
Everthought your Zombie Apocalypse modpack felt a little bland? a little too easy? or.. ever had the feeling of your whatever modpack lacking variations in Zombies? Well, well, well, this mod adds new zombies that fit both the Vanilla and Modded Minecraft experience!

Meet the zombies in question:
- Fatty
  These guys have a 75% chance of exploding upon death. Has a chance to
drop gunpowder (that's if he doesn't explode).

- Spitter
  These guys spit acid projectiles. They have a mechanic where when targets come close (11 blocks),
they begin spitting multiple acid projectiles at once with a better accuracy the closer their target is.

- Crawler
  Low health but quite the hitter. These guys are only 1 block tall and
  capable of climbing walls. They also sometimes spawn a
  Spitter as their rider.

- Zombie Brute
  These guys are basic zombies but bigger, taller, bulkier! They have
a lot of health and damage but walk very slowly. They drop the
basic zombie's loot table 5x. These guys are compatible with
Tissou's Zombie Pack (make sure to use EMF and ETF for the
zombie variants). These zombie brutes should actually be compatible
with any texture pack that changes zombie textures.

You may use this mod in your modpack.
If people enjoy the mod, I will make a config for the mod.
If you like my work and want to support me, feel free to donate me.
If you have suggestions, especially a new mob idea, please comment them.
